name: Stuffed Soft-Shell Crawfish
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare 24 soft-shell crawfish, ensuring they are fresh.
2. Melt 2 tablespoons of butter or margarine in a pan over low heat.
3. Add flour to the melted butter and mix until well combined.
4. Pour in buttermilk and stir until smooth.
5. Heat oil for frying in another pan.
6. Prepare Hollandaise sauce according to your preferred recipe.
6. Stuff the prepared soft-shell crawfish with the flour mixture.
7. Fry the stuffed crawfish in hot oil until golden brown, ensuring they are fully cooked through.
8. Serve the fried crawfish with a side of Hollandaise sauce.
